articles.description: Polygon is adding new users in the form of unique addresses faster than Ethereum despite having a lower count on the number of unique addresses than Ethereum. BEST Q4 SCENARIO! Will This Huge Google Partnership help Pump Bitcoin to $150K?
articles.description: ✅ Follow EllioTrades on Twitter: https://twitter.com/elliotrades Wassup E.T Fam?! I just wanted to briefly check in and talk with you all about the Google and Bakkt partnership that was announced. For those of you that are unaware, Google has partnered with Bakkt to add support for Bakkt’s virtual Visa card through Google Pay. This will allow people to purchase goods or services using Bitcoin.
